old_value: {"id":"broadside-4mox","title":"Auto language detection on posts","description":"Detect language of post content automatically using a lightweight detection library (whatlang or lingua). Set the contentMap field in AP Note objects with the detected language. Useful for client-side language filtering. ~50 lines of implementation.","design":"1. Add whatlang crate (tiny, no network deps, fast). 2. In post creation path, run detection on plain-text content. 3. If confidence is above threshold (e.g. 0.8), set language code. 4. Emit contentMap in AP Note alongside content. 5. Store detected language in posts table (new column via migration).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@reviewcommit.com","created_at":"2026-07-19T00:44:43.325304907Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-19T00:44:43.325304907Z"}

new_value: Done: whatlang crate added. detect_language() in content.rs returns ISO 639-1 code if confidence >= 0.8. contentMap emitted in AP Note objects.
